title: Player API
description: Server-side Player API reference for RpgPlayer and its managers.

index.title: Player API
index.description: Server-side Player API reference for RpgPlayer and its managers.
index.intro: This reference is generated from the JSDoc comments in `@rpgjs/server`. It groups the server-side Player API by manager so you can browse the available commands more easily.

sections.title: Common Commands
sections.description: Core server-side player commands defined on the main Player class.

sections.title: Components
sections.description: Component-based UI layout helpers and component utilities for players.

sections.title: Parameter Commands
sections.description: Level, experience, HP, SP, and parameter management for players.

sections.title: Class Commands
sections.description: Assign and inspect player classes and class-driven behaviors.

sections.title: Gold Commands
sections.description: Read and update player gold on the server side.

sections.title: State Commands
sections.description: Apply, remove, and inspect player states.

sections.title: Element Commands
sections.description: Element offense, defense, and coefficient helpers for players.

sections.title: Item Commands
sections.description: Inventory, equipment, and item usage commands for players.

sections.title: Skill Commands
sections.description: Learn, forget, and use skills from the server-side player API.

sections.title: Variable Commands
sections.description: Store and retrieve player variables that persist across saves and map transfers.

sections.title: Move Commands
sections.description: Movement APIs, movement strategies, and move route helpers.

sections.title: GUI Commands
sections.description: Dialogs, menus, notifications, and custom GUI commands.

sections.title: Battle Commands
sections.description: Battle formulas and server-side battle helpers for players.
